calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-047 multi-source environmental dynamics substrate readiness
items.note: Substrate-readiness diagnostic for SD-047. Sweeps multi_source_intensity_scale across the four pre-registered arms (OFF / 0.25x / 1.0x / 4.0x) under random-policy rollout. Acceptance: ARM_0 bit-identical OFF (C0); ARM_1 weather + env events fire (C1a/b); ARM_2 calibration ratio in [0.5, 2.5] (C2a, target 1:1-2:1 from SD doc; tolerance for Poisson noise across 200 ticks x 3 seeds), all three sources firing (C2b), monotone above ARM_1 (C2c); ARM_3 at-or-above ARM_2 (C3a, saturation permitted at high noise per the SD doc). PASS = SD-047 calibrated and ready for V3-EXQ-510 comparator-gap behavioural test (separate follow-up experiment, not queued in this pass).
